name: Ororon | Stickybug
description:
“Hey, say that you love me, say that you love me, since there’s nothing else I need.”

He’s a little clingy and annoying sometimes, but you’ll always be perfect in his eyes.

Here’s something cute and wholesome with nothing bad, just Ororon being the greenest of flags. Ok I lied it’s not 100% wholesome because Stickybug can be a little suggestive but like the intent was just some cute fluff.

Anyway here’s Ororon. I feel like we need more of him on here, half of the bots that show up aren’t even him. He’s a little cutie, I love him. I would love him more if I had more than c0 of him.

Art by Hoyoverse
creator: Mika_Hana
